name: @mrc2204/agent-smart-memo
description: Smart Memory Plugin for OpenClaw — structured slot memory with auto-capture, auto-recall, essence distillation, and Qdrant vector search

scripts.build: npm run build:openclaw && npm run sync:openclaw:dist
scripts.build:all: npm run build:openclaw && npm run build:paperclip && npm run build:core
scripts.package:openclaw: npm run build:openclaw && node scripts/prepare-package-target.mjs openclaw
scripts.package:paperclip: npm run build:paperclip && node scripts/prepare-package-target.mjs paperclip
scripts.package:core: npm run build:core && node scripts/prepare-package-target.mjs core
scripts.pack:openclaw: npm run package:openclaw && (cd artifacts/npm/openclaw && npm pack)
scripts.pack:paperclip: npm run package:paperclip && (cd artifacts/npm/paperclip && npm pack)
scripts.pack:paperclip:plugin-local: npm run package:paperclip:plugin-local && (cd artifacts/paperclip-plugin-local && npm pack)
scripts.pack:core: npm run package:core && (cd artifacts/npm/core && npm pack)
scripts.publish:openclaw: npm run package:openclaw && node scripts/publish-target.mjs openclaw
scripts.publish:paperclip: npm run package:paperclip && node scripts/publish-target.mjs paperclip
scripts.publish:core: npm run package:core && node scripts/publish-target.mjs core
scripts.test: npx tsx tests/test.ts && npx tsx tests/test-auto-recall.ts && npx tsx tests/test-memory-config.ts
scripts.test:paperclip: npx tsx tests/test-paperclip-contracts.ts && npx tsx tests/test-paperclip-runtime-e2e.ts
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist dist-openclaw dist-paperclip dist-core artifacts/npm

author: mrc2204
